name: AnalysisBeamEnd
summary: The AnalysisBeamEnd class contains information related to analysis beam ends.

constructors.name: AnalysisBeamEnd
constructors.summary: Initializes a new instance of the AnalysisBeamEnd class.

properties.name: Connectivity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the connectivity at the beam end.

properties.name: Eccentricity
properties.summary: Gets or sets the eccentricity at the beam end (in the member's local coordinate system).

properties.name: Profile
properties.summary: Gets or sets the profile at the beam end.
